debug_info.goal:
α : Type
inst✝ : LinearOrder α
label : α
l : LabelledTree α
h : IsOrdered α inst✝ l
⊢ fastCheckMem α inst✝ label l = true ↔ label ∈ l

proof:
induction l with
  | leaf x =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem, beq_iff_eq]
  | node v left right ihl ihr =>
    simp only [IsOrdered] at h
    obtain ⟨hleft, hright, hordl, hordr, hvin⟩ := h
    simp only [fastCheckMem, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem, beq_iff_eq]
    constructor
    · intro hcheck
      split_ifs at hcheck with heq hlt
      · subst heq; exact hvin
      · left; exact (ihl hordl).mp hcheck
      · right; exact (ihr hordr).mp hcheck
    · intro hmem
      split_ifs with heq hlt
      · rfl
      · rcases hmem with hl | hr
        · exact (ihl hordl).mpr hl
        · exact absurd hlt (not_lt.mpr (hright label hr))
      · rcases hmem with hl | hr
        · exact absurd (le_antisymm (hleft label hl) (le_of_not_lt hlt)) (Ne.symm heq)
        · exact (ihr hordr).mpr hr
successful_attempts:
induction l with
  | leaf x =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem, beq_iff_eq]
  | node v left right ihl ihr =>
    simp only [IsOrdered] at h
    obtain ⟨hleft, hright, hordl, hordr, hvin⟩ := h
    simp only [fastCheckMem, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem, beq_iff_eq]
    constructor
    · intro hcheck
      split_ifs at hcheck with heq hlt
      · subst heq; exact hvin
      · left; exact (ihl hordl).mp hcheck
      · right; exact (ihr hordr).mp hcheck
    · intro hmem
      split_ifs with heq hlt
      · rfl
      · rcases hmem with hl | hr
        · exact (ihl hordl).mpr hl
        · exact absurd hlt (not_lt.mpr (hright label hr))
      · rcases hmem with hl | hr
        · exact absurd (le_antisymm (hleft label hl) (le_of_not_lt hlt)) (Ne.symm heq)
        · exact (ihr hordr).mpr hr
